load_hang_cause: models/phi4_weight_cache was empty; every benchmark called store.load() without mmap cache and re-quantized 128 HF projections (~12 min) plus preq repack (~28 min). Processes were killed before completion, appearing hung.
load_hang_fix: Run benchmarks/build_caches.py once (or first compare_llama_cpp.py now saves weight cache). Unset PHI4_NO_WEIGHT_CACHE / PHI4_NO_PREQ_CACHE.

thread_sweep.note: single_tok_bench 24 tokens; full 128-token compare peaks at 12t

e2e_hf_preq_12t.path: HF safetensors + UnifiedEngine preq (Q4K kernel not used)

e2e_hf_preq_13t.note: 128-token compare; 13t worse than 12t on this machine — use 12 for production

e2e_gguf_note: Q4K fix does not change HF-preq path. GGUF native needs ASDSL_USE_Q4KM_GGUF=1 + --gguf-path; no gguf preq cache on disk yet.
ppl_note: GGUF preq cache not built (would need ~30 min repack + disk). HF WikiText-64 ratio ~1.44 unchanged.
